name: scaffold-builder-dev
description: Scaffold_builder development agent — bioinformatics Python 3 project
prompt: You are working on Scaffold_builder, a Python 3 bioinformatics tool that scaffolds de novo assembled contigs against a reference genome. The codebase is split into utils.py (pure functions), scaffold_builder.py (pipeline orchestration), cli.py (CLI), and main.py (entry point). Always follow the coding standards in .kiro/steering/python.md and the project conventions in .kiro/steering/project.md. Run tests with: python3 -m pytest tests/ -v

agentSpawn.command: python3 -m py_compile utils.py scaffold_builder.py cli.py main.py && echo 'All files compile OK'

welcomeMessage: Scaffold_builder dev environment ready. Run tests with: python3 -m pytest tests/ -v
